title: Nihal's Opportunities
subtitle: Real, current openings for patient coordinator, clinic coordinator and health-tourism roles in Istanbul — pulled from the boards, screened against Nihal's CV, and shown so she doesn't have to dig.

candidate.name: Nihal Kocaman
candidate.headline: International Sales Manager & Clinic Coordinator
candidate.experience: ~2.5 years in Istanbul dental tourism (Ekiz Dental, Swedish Clinic, MayClinik)

jobs.title: İngilizce bilen satış uzmanı & yabancı hasta koordinatörü
jobs.why: Bullseye — literally her job title. English foreign-patient coordinator + sales, first contact through aftercare. She did exactly this at Ekiz Dental and MayClinik. Central, near past roles.

jobs.title: Klinik Müdürü — Diş Sağlığı & Sağlık Turizmi
jobs.why: A genuine step up she's qualified for — dental + health tourism management. CV shows operations, team leadership, recruitment and pricing. Convenient side, recent post.

jobs.title: Sağlık Turizmi Uzmanı (Health Tourism Specialist)
jobs.why: Wants a Turkish citizen with strong English in dental health tourism, salary + commission — all fits her. English alone satisfies it (Russian optional). Central Şişli.

jobs.title: İngilizce bilen Sağlık Turizmi Tercümanı / Koordinatör
jobs.why: Interpreter + coordinator combo is exactly their ask; 4-branch group means room to grow. Catch: Tuzla is far (Asian side) vs. her past Sarıyer/Şişli roles.

jobs.title: Sağlık Turizmi Satış Danışmanı
jobs.why: Matches her sales + CRM + lead-management strengths. Sales-leaning rather than full coordination, and Esenyurt is far west — solid backup.

jobs.title: Klinik Yöneticisi
jobs.why: Established, well-known clinic in a prime central district — strong CV name. General management rather than international-focused, so leans on her operations/leadership side.

jobs.title: Klinik Yöneticisi
jobs.clinic: Dr. Çınar Gaffaroğlu Diş Kliniği (Global Group)
jobs.why: Recent, convenient side. Management weighted to operations, purchasing and stock — fits her clinic-ops experience, lighter on the international/English angle.

jobs.title: Klinik Koordinatörü
jobs.why: Newest on the board and a clean coordinator match. Not flagged international (English is upside, not required), and Sancaktepe is far on the Asian side.

jobs.title: Rusça & İngilizce bilen health-tourism personnel
jobs.why: Right kind of role, but they prioritise Russian, which isn't on her CV. Only worth it with some Russian.

jobs.title: İngilizce Tercüman — Sağlık Turizmi
jobs.why: A step down — pure interpreting, below her manager/coordinator level and pay. Fallback only.
